title: Bellamy Strikes Cricket — Part 5
description: Bellamy steals Cricket’s gold and attacks the dreamers, forcing Luffy to answer the insult directly.
scene: Across pages 17, 18, 19, this scene centers on Bellamy, Sarquiss, Mont Blanc Cricket, Luffy, Nami. Bellamy steals Cricket’s gold and attacks the dreamers, forcing Luffy to answer the insult directly.

dialogue.speaker: Bellamy
dialogue.text: What do you mean, forget about it!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Yes, you should be able to.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: W-where do you think you're going, kid!?

dialogue.speaker: Mont Blanc Cricket
dialogue.text: Use this if you wanna stop him.

dialogue.speaker: Masira
dialogue.text: She's gonna make us carry them!

summary: Bellamy steals Cricket’s gold and attacks the dreamers, forcing Luffy to answer the insult directly.
